metodos.codigoOriginal:
Parameters pcCursor, pcNivAnt, pcCurDest

Local lnOldSel, lcXML

lnOldSel = Select()
lcXML = []

If Used([CrAux])
	Use in CrAux
EndIf 

Select &pcCursor.
Select cidchaves, Cods, Descs, 0 as Marcas, Space(4) as Codigo From &pcCursor. Where 1=0 Into Cursor CrAux ReadWrite

Select &pcCursor.	
Go top

Scan 			
	lcXML = Nvl(&pcCursor..Nivel,[])
	Zap in CrAux
	If Not Empty(lcXML)
		= fXmlToCursor(lcXML, [CrAux], .f.)
		Select CrAux
		Scan For CrAux.Marcas <> 0
			Select &pcCurDest.
			Append Blank 
		... [TRUNCADO]
Report Form SigReCnt To Print NoConsole
Report Form SigReCnt To Print Prompt NoConsole

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
	
		ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery([SigCdPam], [LocalPam], .f., .f., [GrPadVens])
		If Not Used([LocalPam])
			=MessageBox([Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!], 16, [Falha na Conexăo (CursorQuery - LocalPam)])
			Return .f.
		EndIf
		
		Go Top In LocalPam
		If Empty(LocalPam.GrPadVens)
			=MessageBox([O Grupo Padrăo de Vendedores Năo Está Configurado Nos] + Chr(13) + ;
						[Parâmetros do Siste... [TRUNCADO]

Private pDtI, pDtF
Local lcLocals, lcVends, lnLocal, ldData, lcLocalizacao

lnOrdem = ThisForm.OptOrdem.Value
lcLocalizacao = []
lcBase = ThisForm.getBase.Value
lcNvl2 = ThisForm.getNvl2.Value
lcNvl3 = ThisForm.getNvl3.Value
lcNvl4 = ThisForm.getNvl4.Value


lcLocalizacao = Alltrim(lcBase)+Alltrim(lcNvl2)+Alltrim(lcNvl3)+Alltrim(lcNvl4)

Wait Window 'Aguarde Processamento!' Nowait

Create Cursor csCabecalho (NomeEmpresa c(80), Titulo c(200), Titulo2 c(200), Figura c(10))
Thisform.poDataMgr.Curso... [TRUNCADO]
Report Form SigReCnt Preview NoConsole

If (This.Value <> 4)
	If Empty(ThisForm.getDatas.Value)	
		=Messagebox('Data Inválida!', 16, 'Aviso')
		ThisForm.getDatas.SetFocus()
		Return 0
	EndIf


EndIf

frmrelatorio::btnReport.Click
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Local loLista
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigLcNv1', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'Cods', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Cods',  '', 'Localizaçăo')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Descs', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Value = crListaRemota.Cods
	ThisForm.getDBase.Value = crListaRemota.Descs
	
	Use In crListaRemota

EndIf
This.Refresh
ThisForm.getDBase.Refresh 
* Fim ******... [TRUNCADO]

ThisForm.getDBase.Value = []
ThisForm.getNvl2.Value = []
ThisForm.getDNvl2.Value = []
ThisForm.getNvl3.Value = []
ThisForm.getDNvl3.Value = []
ThisForm.getNvl4.Value = []
ThisForm.getDNvl4.Value = []

Local loBrow, lcNivel

lcNivel = Alltrim(ThisForm.getBase.Value)

If !IsEmpty(This.Value)
	Select * From CrSigLcNv2 Where Cods = lcNivel ;
		Into Cursor LocalNivel Readwrite

	Select LocalNivel
	Index On Codigo Tag Codigo
	Set Near On
	If !Seek(This.Value)
		loBrow = Createobject( 'fwbuscasel', 'LocalNivel', 'Codigo', This.Value, 'Seleçăo' )
		loBrow.AddColuna( 'Codigo','', 'Código'  , .T., 'Codigo' )
		loBrow.AddColuna( 'Descs', '', 'Descrçăo', .F. )
		loBrow.Show
		This.Value = LocalNivel.Codi... [TRUNCADO]

If Empty(ThisForm.getBase.Value)
	Wait Window [Nível Anterior năo Informado.] Nowait
	Return .F.
Endif

ThisForm.getDNvl2.Value = []
ThisForm.getNvl3.Value = []
ThisForm.getDNvl3.Value = []
ThisForm.getNvl4.Value = []
ThisForm.getDNvl4.Value = []
Return Empty(ThisForm.getConta.Value)

Local loBrow, lcNivel

lcNivel = Alltrim(ThisForm.getNvl2.Value)

If !IsEmpty(This.Value)
	Select * From CrSigLcNv3 Where Cods = lcNivel ;
		Into Cursor LocalNivel Readwrite

	Select LocalNivel
	Index On Codigo Tag Codigo
	Set Near On
	If !Seek(This.Value)
		loBrow = Createobject( 'fwbuscasel', 'LocalNivel', 'Codigo', This.Value, 'Seleçăo' )
		loBrow.AddColuna( 'Codigo','', 'Código'  , .T., 'Codigo' )
		loBrow.AddColuna( 'Descs', '', 'Descrçăo', .F. )
		loBrow.Show
		This.Value = LocalNivel.Codi... [TRUNCADO]

If Empty(ThisForm.getNvl2.Value)
	Wait Window [Nível Anterior năo Informado.] Nowait
	Return .F.
Endif

ThisForm.getDNvl3.Value = []
ThisForm.getNvl4.Value = []
ThisForm.getDNvl4.Value = []
Return .F.
Return .F.
Return .F.
ThisForm.getDNvl4.Value = []

If Empty(ThisForm.getNvl3.Value)
	Wait Window [Nível Anterior năo Informado.] Nowait 
	Return .F.
Endif

Local loBrow, lcNivel

lcNivel = Alltrim(ThisForm.getNvl3.Value)

If !IsEmpty(This.Value)
	Select * From CrSigLcNv4 Where Cods = lcNivel Into Cursor LocalNivel Readwrite
	Select LocalNivel
	Index On Codigo Tag Codigo
	Set Near On
	If !Seek(This.Value)
		loBrow = Createobject( 'fwbuscasel', 'LocalNivel', 'Codigo', This.Value, 'Seleçăo' )
		loBrow.AddColuna( 'Codigo','', 'Código'  , .T., 'Codigo' )
		loBrow.AddColuna( 'Descs', '', 'Descrçăo', .F. )
		loBrow.Show
		This.Value = LocalNivel.Codigo
		... [TRUNCADO]
Return .F.

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select cidchaves, Cods, Descs, 0 as Marcas, Space(4) as Codigo From &pcCursor. Where 1=0 Into Cursor CrAux ReadWrite

lcSql = [Select a.iclis,a.rclis,a.grupos,a.situas,a.Cpfs,a.inativas,a.ContaMats,a.Emps ] + ; 			[From SigCdCli a ] + ; 			[Inner Join SigCdGcr b On a.Grupos = b.Codigos  ] + ; 			[And (Not b.Coletors = 10 Or (b.Coletors = 10  ] + ; 			[And a.IClis Not In (Select Distinct c.Jobs From SigCdAcJ c ] + ; 									[Where c.Jobs Not In (Select Distinct d.Jobs From SigCdAcJ d Where d.Usuars = ']+This.Value+[')))) ] + ; 			[And a.grupos = ']+LocalPam.GrPadVens+[' ]... [TRUNCADO]
Select * From CrSigLcNv2 Where Cods = lcNivel ; 		Into Cursor LocalNivel Readwrite

lcSql = [Select a.iclis,a.rclis,a.grupos,a.situas,a.Cpfs,a.inativas,a.ContaMats,a.Emps ] + ; 			[From SigCdCli a ] + ; 			[Inner Join SigCdGcr b On a.Grupos = b.Codigos  ] + ; 			[And (Not b.Coletors = 10 Or (b.Coletors = 10  ] + ; 			[And a.IClis Not In (Select Distinct c.Jobs From SigCdAcJ c ] + ; 									[Where c.Jobs Not In (Select Distinct d.Jobs From SigCdAcJ d Where d.Usuars = ']+lcVends+[')))) ] + ; 			[And a.grupos = ']+Loc... [TRUNCADO]
Select * From CrSigLcNv3 Where Cods = lcNivel ; 		Into Cursor LocalNivel Readwrite
Select * From CrSigLcNv4 Where Cods = lcNivel Into Cursor LocalNivel Readwrite
